# TS9302

**Category:** Higher-Kinded Types · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
@hkt can only be applied to interfaces or type aliases
```

## Explanation

The @hkt decorator marks a type as a higher-kinded type constructor.
It can only be applied to interface or type alias declarations.

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
